SEARCH
Package app.service

Interface AnomaliesDetectionService

All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService, QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService
public interface AnomaliesDetectionService
Service interface defining operations for training anomaly detection models and evaluating datasets to identify abnormal financial records.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AnomalyResult>
    searchForAnomaly(smile.anomaly.IsolationForest isolationForest, List<DataRecord> data, double threshold)
    Evaluates a list of target financial records against a trained Isolation Forest model to identify data points that exceed the specified abnormality threshold.
    smile.anomaly.IsolationForest
    trainIsolationForest(List<DataRecord> data)
    Trains an Isolation Forest model using the provided baseline context training dataset.

  • Method Details

    • trainIsolationForest

      smile.anomaly.IsolationForest trainIsolationForest(List<DataRecord> data)
      Trains an Isolation Forest model using the provided baseline context training dataset.
      Parameters:
      data - A List of historical DataRecord instances used to establish normal behavior.
      Returns:
      A trained IsolationForest model instance.

    • searchForAnomaly

      List<AnomalyResult> searchForAnomaly(smile.anomaly.IsolationForest isolationForest, List<DataRecord> data, double threshold)
      Evaluates a list of target financial records against a trained Isolation Forest model to identify data points that exceed the specified abnormality threshold.
      Parameters:
      isolationForest - The pre-trained IsolationForest engine to use for evaluation.
      data - The working List of target DataRecord instances to scan for anomalies.
      threshold - The statistical contamination sensitivity limit mapping anomaly criteria.
      Returns:
      A List containing the evaluated AnomalyResult metrics for elements flagged as anomalous.
